login.accessCodeAttempts: Attempts are counted per device. After 2 errors, a 5-minute lockout applies.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your trainer account email. We'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successDefault: If the email is registered, you will receive a password reset link within a few minutes.
forgotPassword.errorDefault: Error sending request. Please try again.

resetPassword.title: Reset password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.success: Password reset successfully! Sign in with your new password.
resetPassword.errorDefault: Error resetting password. Please try again.
resetPassword.invalidLink: Invalid link. Request a new email from Forgot password.
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters.

personal.noWorkoutToday: No students with a workout today.
personal.noActivity24h: No workout completions in the last 24h
personal.noActivityHint: When your students finish workouts, they will appear here
personal.emptyStudentsDesc: Register students and create personalized workout plans for each one.
personal.freeLimitBanner: Free plan limit reached. Subscribe to add more students.

studentForm.paymentDueDayHint: Day of the month the student usually pays. Helps remind you when to block access.
studentForm.paymentDueDayHintShort: Day of the month the student usually pays.

deleteStudent.title: Delete Student?
deleteStudent.confirm: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
deleteStudent.warning: This cannot be undone. All workouts and progress for this student will be lost.

studentCard.shareMessage: Hi {{name}}! Access your workout area on Gym Code. Use this link to sign in with your code already filled in: {{url}}

workouts.title: Workout Management
workouts.subtitle: Create and manage personalized workout plans
workouts.emptyStudentsDesc: Register students first before creating workouts for them.
workouts.noWorkoutForDayDesc: Create a workout for {{day}} by clicking the button below
workouts.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete workout {{name}}?
workouts.deleteWarning: This cannot be undone. All exercises will be lost.
workouts.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the goal of this workout...
workouts.weekdaysMulti: Days of the Week * (select one or more)
workouts.daysAlreadyAllocated: Blue days already have a workout for this student.
workouts.dayAlreadyAllocated: This day already has a workout for this student
workouts.replicateDays: This workout will be replicated for {{count}} days
workouts.deleteExerciseConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete exercise {{name}}?
workouts.librarySelectHint: Select an existing workout to reuse exercises and save time.
workouts.supportMessage: Hello, I'm a GymApp Pro subscriber and need support.

exercise.name: Exercise Name *
exercise.imageHint: Link to an image so the student can visualize the movement

suggestions.youtubeEmpty: No suggestions for this term right now.
suggestions.youtubeHint: Click a video to automatically fill the field above.
suggestions.imagesEmpty: No suggestions for this term right now.
suggestions.imagesHint: Click an image to automatically fill the field above.

brand.title: App colors (student view)
brand.subtitle: Customize buttons and highlights your students see — does not change your trainer panel.

logo.title: Trainer logo
logo.subtitle: Your brand appears in the student view. Choose a photo from the gallery — square PNG or JPG recommended.
logo.iosHint: On iPhone/iPad you can also choose "Take Photo" in the system picker.
logo.invalidType: Select an image (JPEG, PNG or WebP).

preview.title: Preview — student view
preview.simulationHint: Simulation of how the student will see the app on mobile

student.openOnYoutube: Can't watch here? Open on YouTube
student.noWorkoutTodayDesc: Enjoy your rest day or check your other workouts!
student.weeklyWorkoutsHint: View your workouts for the week
student.noWorkoutForDayDesc: Your trainer has not defined a workout for this day yet

blocked.title: Payment pending
blocked.message1: We identified a pending monthly payment. As a result, access to workouts was automatically blocked by the system.
blocked.message2: Settle the payment to restore your access. Once confirmed, workouts will be unlocked again.
blocked.whatsappMessage: Hello! I'd like to settle my payment to unlock access to my workouts.

errors.tooManyAttempts: Too many login attempts. Wait 5 minutes before trying again.
errors.deleteStudent: Error deleting student. Please try again.
errors.updateBlock: Error updating block status. Please try again.
errors.subscriptionLimit: Free plan student limit reached. Subscribe to add more students.
errors.deleteWorkout: Error deleting workout. Please try again.
errors.selectDayRequired: Select a day of the week
errors.selectOneDayRequired: Select at least one day of the week
errors.youtubeLoad: Could not load YouTube suggestions right now.
errors.imagesLoad: Could not load image suggestions right now.
errors.studentLimitTooltip: Student limit reached on the free plan.

cancelHint.ios: Para cancelar, abre Ajustes → Apple ID → Suscripciones.
cancelHint.web: To cancel, open subscription settings in the App Store or Google Play.

subscription.storeMessage: Open the Gym Code app in the store and subscribe to Pro. Your account will update automatically after purchase.
subscription.downloadAppMessage: Download Gym Code on the App Store (iPhone) or Google Play (Android) to subscribe to Pro with secure store billing.
subscription.compareTitle: Subscribe to Pro or compare benefits:
subscription.proActiveDesc: You have unlimited students and all plan benefits.
subscription.linkedToStore: Subscription linked to your store account.

cancelNote.ios: Cancela en Ajustes → Apple ID → Suscripciones. Mantienes Pro hasta el fin del período pagado.
cancelNote.android: Cancel in play.google.com → Subscriptions. You keep Pro until the paid period ends.
cancelNote.web: Cancel in App Store or Google Play settings. You keep Pro until the paid period ends.

priceNote.ios: Exact price is shown by the App Store before confirmation.
priceNote.android: Exact price is shown by Google Play before confirmation.
priceNote.web: Exact price is shown by the App Store or Google Play before confirmation.

benefitSecurePay.web: Secure payment via Apple or Google

subscribeViaStore.web: Subscribe via App Store / Google Play

subscription.browserNote: In the browser, you will be redirected to your phone store. Subscription only works in the Gym Code mobile app.

register.welcomeTitle: Let's set up your professional space
register.welcomeSubtitle: In a few steps you'll be ready to train clients with organization.
register.identitySubtitle: Your name will appear to students in the app.
register.accessSubtitle: Phone and CREF are optional but help with credibility.
register.addressSubtitle: Address for future billing — you can skip if you prefer.
register.celebrationSubtitle: Workouts, clients and training — all in one place.
register.journeyStarts: {{name}}, your journey as a trainer starts now.
register.errorDefault: Error signing up. Please try again.

validation.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters.

account.deletePersonalDesc: Permanently removes your trainer account, all students, workouts and associated data. This cannot be undone.
account.deleteStudentDesc: Permanently removes your student profile, workout history and progress. This cannot be undone.
account.personalBullet1: Your trainer account will be removed
account.personalBullet2: All your students will be deleted
account.personalBullet3: Workouts, messages and history will be erased
account.studentBullet1: Your student profile will be removed
account.studentBullet2: Your workout history and progress will be erased
account.studentBullet3: You will need a new registration to use the app again
account.confirmPasswordIntro: Enter your password to confirm your identity:
account.acknowledge: I understand all my data will be permanently deleted and I cannot recover this account.
account.deleteError: Could not delete account. Please try again.

disclosure.ios: Gym Code Pro Monthly — auto-renewing subscription every 1 month. Price shown on the App Store at purchase will be charged and renewed unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the current period ends.
disclosure.android: Gym Code Pro Monthly — auto-renewing subscription every 1 month. Price shown on Google Play at purchase will be charged and renewed unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the current period ends.
disclosure.web: Gym Code Pro Monthly — auto-renewing subscription every 1 month. Price shown on the App Store or Google Play at purchase will be charged and renewed unless cancelled at least 24 hours before the current period ends.

cancelHow.ios: Cancela en Ajustes → Apple ID → Suscripciones.
cancelHow.web: Cancel in Settings → Apple ID → Subscriptions (iOS) or play.google.com → Subscriptions (Android).
